title: Oreocharis minor

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat a range of ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Oreocharis minor include iridoid glycosides, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Oreocharis minor is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, as well as being used in the form of capsules or tablets, to take advantage of its health benefits.
